texto: I know that my buddy Jorgeson was a real American hero. I wish that he had lived to be something else, if not a painter of pictures then even some kind of fuckup with a factory job and four divorces, bankruptcy petitions, in and out of jail. I wish he had been that. I wish he had been anything rather than a real American hero.
explicacao: Citação de Thom Jones sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I know that my buddy Jorgeson was a real American hero. I wish that he had lived to be something …” articula trabalho, heroism, survival em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como survival.
